* The shape of the elastic scattering angular
distributions and the scattering cross sections have
all been corrected for the effects of multiple
scattering, flux attenuation and finite source-sample
geometry using the Monte-Carlo program MAGGIE.
Corrections for similar effects in the polythene
samples were also made using MAGGIE.
